news-global-econ.title: Minnesota millionaire who qualified for food stamps warns of 'fraud by design' loophole ahead of hearing
news-global-econ.description: A millionaire says he qualified for food stamps via a SNAP loophole and will testify at a Minnesota state hearing pushing for stricter asset test reforms.

news-global-econ.title: Gov Josh Shapiro admits Dem issues beyond rhetoric, says they failed to deliver to voters
news-global-econ.description: Pennsylvania Gov. Josh Shapiro argues the Democratic Party's problems go beyond messaging, saying Democrats failed to deliver tangible results and need an internal reckoning.

news-global-econ.title: Closing Down Germany's Nuclear Plants 'Huge Strategic Error' Says International Energy Agency
news-global-econ.description:
It's a mistake which has exacerbated the energy crisis in Europe, the director of the International Energy Agency said.
The post Closing Down Germany’s Nuclear Plants ‘Huge Strategic Error’ Says International Energy Agency appeared first on Breitbart.

news-global-econ.title: Trump unleashes nuclear boom, powering America back to energy dominance
news-global-econ.description: The DOE's Nuclear Lifecycle Innovation Campus concept proposes state-led hubs to rebuild America's nuclear fuel cycle and restore industrial leadership.

news-global-econ.title: Trump delays energy strikes, sets five days for Iran talks
news-global-econ.description: Trump told reporters Monday that he was holding off on attacking Iranian energy infrastructure for five days, citing “major points of agreement” with Iran.

news-global-soc.title: Trump unveils national AI policy framework
news-global-soc.description: The Trump administration released a national AI framework addressing safety, jobs, energy use and free speech as the U.S. seeks to stay competitive globally.

news-global-soc.title: Red wealth, dark money: How an American tycoon deploys Mao's playbook against the West
news-global-soc.description: Fox News Digital reveals how $278M of Singham’s fortune moved through shell-like entities, shared boards and interconnected nonprofits.

news-global-soc.title: Scammers using AI meet their match as OpenAI, tech industry fight back
news-global-soc.description: OpenAI joins the Global Anti-Scam Alliance and launches Scam.org, an AI-powered platform supporting scam victims in over 50 languages worldwide.
